notes: Oneironautics Inc., Portland OR (2005) · RESTORATION CAMPAIGN, set 2016. The studio's course-correct after Estuary 3's cult reception - and the strangest object in the classic run: a 2005 game set eleven years ahead, imagining a near future where somebody finally goes back and fixes the water. Ashford Cade's cabin note ('back in the spring · 2016') was always this game's door.

shelf.label_subtitle: the archive · the water · the hunter · the king tide
shelf.shelf_condition: the big box of the line · the fold-out watershed map is soft at the creases from being folded out
